assets.name: Heritage / biosim portfolio + Other revenues (Epogen + Neupogen + Bkemv + Riabni + Kanjinti + royalties)

market.notes: Heritage tail (~$2.5B): Epogen (~$200M, EPO short-acting eroded), Neupogen (~$50M filgrastim), Bkemv (Soliris biosim ~$60M), Riabni (Rituxan biosim ~$200M), Kanjinti (Herceptin biosim ~$200M), Sensipar legacy, Vectibix ROW alliance, Otezla acquisition royalties. Plus Total Revenues - Product Sales delta of ~$1.6B (royalty + alliance income, primarily from Cinta with BMS, Onyx Kyprolis royalty income, JAVELIN PD-1 milestones).

assets.name: MariTide (maridebart cafraglutide) — GIPR antagonist + GLP-1 agonist (obesity Ph3)
assets.stage: Phase 3 MARITIME (5 Ph3 trials: obesity + obesity-CV + obesity-T2D + osa + cv)

indications.name: Obesity (chronic weight management; CV + T2D + OSA labels)

market.notes: Bispecific antibody-peptide conjugate: GIPR antagonism + GLP-1 agonism (q1mo SC). MARITIME Ph3 program (5 trials). Differentiated mechanism vs incretin agonists (Wegovy SNY/Lilly Zepbound). Ph2 obesity ~20% weight loss with sustained effect post-discontinuation.

mega_bear.narrative: Prolia/Xgeva biosim cliffs hit; MariTide Ph3 disappoints vs Lilly/Novo; Repatha competition from MK-0616 oral; pipeline misses
events: X Prolia/Xgeva combined biosim cliff steeper -50%
X MariTide Ph3 obesity disappoints vs incretins
X Repatha share loss to MK-0616 oral PCSK9 2027+
X Imdelltra growth slowed by capacity
X Enbrel IRA Medicare net price -50%

bear.narrative: Steady Repatha + Tezspire + Imdelltra; Prolia/Xgeva managed biosim erosion; MariTide approved obesity
events: ~ Repatha $5B+ peak
~ Tezspire $4B+ peak
~ Imdelltra $2B+ peak
~ MariTide approved 2028; modest uptake vs Wegovy/Zepbound
~ Prolia/Xgeva combined -25% to ~$5B 2027

base.narrative: MariTide $8B+ obesity blockbuster; Repatha $6B+; Tezspire $5B+; Imdelltra $3B+ SCLC franchise; Horizon synergies + 4 Ph3 reads
events: V MariTide approved 2028; $8B peak across obesity/CV/T2D/OSA
V Repatha $6B+ peak post-MK-0616 competition
V Tezspire $5B+ severe asthma + COPD label expansion
V Imdelltra $3B+ SCLC 1L IMforte combo
V Tepezza $3B+ TED with chronic disease label
V Olpasiran approved Lp(a) post-OCEAN(a)
V Rocatinlimab approved AD

bull.narrative: MariTide $15B obesity dominance; Repatha + Tezspire combined $12B; Olpasiran + Rocatinlimab approved; Horizon transformational
events: V MariTide $15B+ obesity blockbuster (broader label inc. OSA + CV + T2D)
V Repatha + Tezspire combined $12B+
V Imdelltra $5B+ SCLC + later-line lung
V Olpasiran + Rocatinlimab + Bemarituzumab all approved
V MTAP MTA franchise (AMG 193) emerges $3B+
V Multiple expansion to peak premium

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Multi-franchise dominance; MariTide $20B+ obesity standard; full pipeline approved; transformational
events: V MariTide $20B+ obesity standard (CV outcomes positive)
V All 6 Ph3 pipeline approved; MTAP franchise dominates 15% of cancer
V Premium multiple expansion

lastData.title: FY2025 Total Revenues $36.75B (+9% reported); Product Sales $35.15B. Top growth: Repatha + Tezspire + Imdelltra + Tepezza + Krystexxa. MariTide Ph3 obesity transformational opportunity.
points: Repatha $3.0B (+44% Q4); LDL CV outcomes driving
Prolia $4.4B + Xgeva $2.1B ($6.5B combined; biosim cliff Feb 2025 LOE)
Tezspire $1.5B (+52%); 50/50 with AZN; severe asthma anti-TSLP
Blincyto $1.6B; first BiTE 1L MRD+ B-ALL adj
MariTide MARITIME Ph3 obesity (5 trials); Ph2 ~20% weight loss
Olpasiran OCEAN(a) Lp(a) CV outcomes Ph3 readout 2026
Rocatinlimab ROCKET AD Ph3 (8 trials); Bemarituzumab FORTITUDE gastric Ph3
Horizon Therapeutics $28B acq Oct 2023 -- Tepezza/Krystexxa/Uplizna/Tavneos contributing

nextCatalyst.title: Rocatinlimab ROCKET AD + MariTide MARITIME obesity + Olpasiran Lp(a)
thresholds: H1 2026: Rocatinlimab ROCKET Ph3 AD readouts (8 trials)
H2 2026: Olpasiran OCEAN(a) Lp(a) CV outcomes Ph3 readout (transformational)

risks: Prolia + Xgeva combined biosim cliff Feb 2025 LOE (~$6.5B brand; Sandoz Wyost + Teva launches)
Enbrel IRA Medicare net price -35% in 2026; -50% reset risk 2027
MariTide vs Wegovy (Novo) + Zepbound (Lilly) entrenched class leaders
Repatha vs MK-0616 oral PCSK9 (Merck) Ph3 readout 2026 -- competitive threat
Imdelltra DeLLphi-304 confirmatory (high confidence but binary)
Tepezza class threat from Viridian VRDN-001 (Ph3 IGF-1R) + Immunovant lonigutamab (Ph3)
Horizon $28B integration: 5-yr synergy realization vs goodwill impairment risk
Otezla growth muted post-CD acq (Bristol divest); Sotyktu (BMS oral TYK2) competition
Biosimilar portfolio competes vs class peers + price compression

catalysts.title: Olpasiran OCEAN(a) Lp(a) CV outcomes Ph3 readout
catalysts._rationale: First Lp(a)-CV outcomes; class race vs pelacarsen (NVS).

catalysts.title: MariTide MARITIME Ph3 obesity readout (key)
catalysts._rationale: Ph2 ~20% weight loss with sustained effect; differentiated vs incretins.

catalysts.title: Rocatinlimab ROCKET Ph3 AD readouts
catalysts._rationale: First anti-OX40 in AD; vs Dupixent class leader.

catalysts.title: Imdelltra DeLLphi-304 Ph3 confirmatory + 1L IMforte combo readouts
